title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the High Court at Bombay (Extension of Jurisdiction to Goa, Daman and Diu) Act, 1981. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 30th October, 1982, vide notification No. G.S.R. 592(E), dated 8th October, 1982, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
